human_task_name: SynAIpse CC2 exact admitted patch QA disproof
objective: Independently disprove the exact admitted CC2 source patch for producer-reader compatibility, failure-envelope semantics, and decision-stop behavior without editing source or Git.

decision_frame.value: Obtain fresh independent QA Disproof evidence against the exact target and staged patch pair.
decision_frame.why_now: The Worker accepted the reconstructed exact admitted patch; the consequential review plan requires a fresh independent disproof lane before fan-in.
acceptance_criteria: HEAD remains 8aa5e406f49c84ba04fa39e628d9d8f5a3ea35c8 and the staged patch digest remains 1d4ed517e6cdf2cdee3065c812049cfa91befc60d3e172dbbb3442aed4665afe.
Run focused disproof tests and inspect the public schema, canonical producers, readers, parser, semantic validator, and legacy compatibility.
Return accepted only when no reproducible source or contract defect remains; otherwise return rejected with assertion-shaped findings.
Write the declared pm-child-result/v1 artifact and handoff, binding the Worker result SHA 479de4531c6eedf6139aaedb1ae649e64d7c43246b8235d12dd1987afe9309e0.
decision_frame.risk_or_learning_target: Prevent a same-agent or stale-head review from being counted as independent disproof.
decision_frame.smallest_increment: One fresh read-only QA disproof review against the exact target/staged-patch pair.

review_plan.adversarial_review_rationale: CC2 changes a public versioned failure envelope and compatibility readers, so independent disproof and adversarial review are required before any source commit.

non_goals: Do not edit source, tests, contracts, packets, or existing evidence.
Do not stage, commit, push, create or update a PR, mutate hosted state, or clean any worktree.
Do not claim Worker acceptance, Adversarial Review, fan-in, hosted checks, hosted review, human acceptance, merge, release, or production readiness.

validation_entrypoints: MISE_NO_CONFIG=1 pnpm exec vitest run src/lib/synaipse/context-contract.test.ts src/lib/synaipse/context-plane.test.ts src/lib/decision/harness-decision.test.ts src/commands/next.test.ts --maxWorkers=1 --reporter=dot

delegated_decision_rights: Run read-only review commands and write only the declared QA artifacts.
